title: adonis aestivalis subvar. flava
intro: Adonis aestivalis subvar. flava, also known as the golden autumn gentian or yellow Adonis, is a plant species belonging to the Buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Adonis aestivalis subvar. flava include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce anxiety. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
